PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel ?league ?leagueLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q11151 wdt:P1406 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P1566 ?team .
  ?season wdt:P585 ?seasonDate .
  ?team p:P459 ?stmt .
  ?stmt ps:P459 ?league .
  ?stmt pq:P585 ?membershipDate .
  FILTER(?membershipDate <= ?seasonDate)
  FILTER(?league != wd:Q100463)
  FILTER(?league != wd:Q188712)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = "en")
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?league rdfs:label ?leagueLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?leagueLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?seasonDate)
LIMIT 1
